The character needs to move:
- Down: from row 14 to around row 29 (the top of the green area) = about 15 rows
- Right: from col 16 to around col 41 (the left of the green area) = about 25 cols

- Down moves needed: ~15/3 = 5 moves
- Right moves needed: ~25/3 = ~8-9 moves

Let me try a different approach: just move the character right and down to get it closer to the green target and see what happens. I'll batch several moves.
Actually, let me think about this more carefully. The target is ~25 cols right and ~15 rows down. Each move is 3 cells. So I need about 8-9 RIGHT and 5 DOWN moves. Let me try to batch them.
